acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Piedmont PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harrassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid case number and is stored indefinitely. This data is regularly audited every 90 days.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
